item.title: JUNKO Body Paint - MCroft07
item.description:
The paint took me forever! I really wanted to add a touch of realism to it so I added in loads of fabric folds but then I got carried away and made the collar part of the illusion and the tie "fly" away and added a lot of shading to it. Regardless, I'm still really happy with how it turned out! I haven't played Danganronpa, I watched the anime but I thought it was pretty dull personally. I just liked her design and wanted to try paint it :) If you wanted to see more paints, I'm Mcroft07 everywhere. I don't post them all on here because I don't want to spam ? I had some confusion before, but I paint them myself, I'm the model and the artist. I just look in a mirror while I'm doing it and paint myself. I actually do it live on twitch for those people who refused to believe me ?
This is the character reference in case you aren't familiar with Junko
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: Time to Resurrect these Memes
item.dc:creator: gambrill

item.title: Thanks for the laughs Imgur
item.description: I'm a long-time member here. I remember posting about my friend Trevor, who passed away from Esophagus-cancer back in 2019. He was immortalized in Borderlands 3 with a shotgun named The Trevornator. Y'all showed a lot of kindness back then. I haven't been very active since his passing in October of 2019, but I've never forgotten the things that y'all did for him and me. I can't afford the treatment. My family and friends are all lower class. I don't expect money from any of you. I'm looking down the barrel of $40k for my treatment. The only thing I ask of y'all is that you look over the posts I've made in the last 6+ years and have a laugh at the dumb shit I've posted. Thanks for listening, Imgur. I wish you all the happiness in life.
item.dc:creator: Jepalaudsadsin

item.dc:creator: FerbIsMySpiritAnimal

item.title: The One-legged Torii of Nagasaki
item.description: 被爆 - Hibaku - literally translates as "one affected by an explosion/bombing." The most common modern usage is "hibakusha" which refers to individual people who experienced, survived, or who suffered physical effects from the atomic bombings of Hiroshima and Nagasaki. The word itself has nothing to do with a new type of bomb, the unique designs of the bombs, or even the radiological aspects of the bombs. I found myself hung up on this nomenclature and eventually needed a teacher of english to fully understand: "Compare, in American English, 9/11. They're just two numbers. Even if we interpret it as a date, there have been hundreds of September 11ths in US history, and countless events have occurred during them. Nothing in the etymology of this term refers directly to the destruction of the World Trade Center and the resulting deaths. But that's the term that caught on." This was a facet of language I rarely think about; how the meaning of the word depends wholly upon background historical knowledge and cultural context. There are also hibaku buildings and, something I found personally interesting, hibaku trees. This is the One-legged Torii Gate in Nagasaki. It was one of several torii for the Shinto Sannō Shrine, originally built in 1638, whose name means "King of the Mountain." On August 9, 1945, the first 20-kiloton Mark III nuclear bomb (whose plutonium core was created in Hanford, Washington) detonated 2,600 feet away. The shrine was instantly flattened, and the force of the shock wave smashed the torii gate. One half of the gate shattered and fell, but the other half rotated about thirty degrees on its pedestal and astonishingly remained upright. Today the dense urban regrowth of Nagasaki largely obscures this hibaku structure. It is a landmark that will not be found except by those who seek it, standing atop a staircase at the end of a dead-end street, at the start of a residential area connected by tight mazes of pedestrian-only streets. The remains of the shattered half of the gate lie nearby with informational displays. The base is covered with gifts and offerings. The shrine itself has been rebuilt, just around the corner from the gate. It is the site of a kindergarten playground, which is itself sheltered beneath the massive canopy of two great Camphor trees who are assessed to be 500 years old and are themselves... hibaku.
item.dc:creator: AtomicAerials

item.title: Robin Hood meme pop-up card (first concept)
item.description: I’m working on this new meme card. One of my favorites. This is a really rough first try. I’m now working on the final artwork, and the branch in the foreground will also look much better. Based on the Rhys Darby - Robin Hood - Fight For Fair 2 degrees advertisement
item.dc:creator: PaulDeGraaf

item.title: Day 3 of crafting Princess Irulan from Dune Part 2 - YuzuPyon
item.description: Hi everyone :) Here's a recap of my Day 3 of making Princess Irulan cosplay from Dune Part 2 movie. If you're interested to see more, I will compile all my progress into a longer process video on https://youtube.com/@yuzupyon ? Due to popular demand on previous posts, I made this video a bit longer so you don't have to pause to read all texts! If you only care about the final result, I will post the results pictures on https://instagram.com/yuzu.pyon once I get to do a proper photoshoot ? See you on Day 4! :) Have a nice day!! Music is you look lonely by Aaron Hibell
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

item.description: It was a crane. A fucking crane u.u
item.dc:creator: Drunkfu

item.title: Hello imgur! Here is the story of my car build so far. ☆彡
item.description:
The day I bought her. I sold my old car on a whim and bought this four door er34 skyline, naturally aspirated (without a turbo, for the non car folks). These cars were used as taxis in Japan and I thought I was so cool for it. She was imported in 2009 from Japan!
My first drive in her!!
Picking out a colour to wrap her
Started the wrap (no idea wtf I was doing)
Fitted the body kit and finished the wrap!!!
Made a mini version of my car for my toddler ?
Took her to the track for the first time
Decided to ruin my perfectly healthy car and put a big fat turbo in her so she can go stututu
Got plates for myself!! I wanted these for literal years and couldn’t believe it when the package finally arrived. Sukeban is like a gang member of the female equivalent of the Yakuza. I’m not that cool but I want people to think I am
Car had a misfire since I bought it so I changed the spark plugs (it didn’t fix it sad day) still can’t afford an ecu so we’re assuming the ecu is causing the misfire for now
A good friend of mine did me a huge favour and built me a custom exhaust.
How she currently looks! I still have so much I want to do like an ECU but that is so much money away, but I wanted to share my progress so far
item.dc:creator: sukebanr345
